response.global_analysis: Audio identified as a cover of 'Realize' by Konomi Suzuki. The Reference JSON had no lyrics, so I transcribed directly from the audio and verified phonetics. MC segment contains a mix of English and Japanese speech, which I have transcribed and translated. The final segment contains a promotional banner with merchandise details, which I have transcribed as secondary priority. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset.

subtitles.original: さあ 声を上げて 歩み始めなきゃ
subtitles.english: Come on, raise your voice and start walking

subtitles.original: Realize 私よ 気づいて
subtitles.english: Realize, it's me, notice me

subtitles.original: また あの季節 この空の下 見上げている
subtitles.english: Again, that season, beneath this sky, I'm looking up

subtitles.original: 傷ついたもの もう 元には 戻らないけれど
subtitles.english: Things that were hurt won't ever return to the way they were, but...

subtitles.original: あー 離したくない 離れたくない
subtitles.english: Ah, I don't want to let go, I don't want to be apart

subtitles.original: もう 諦めない
subtitles.english: I won't give up anymore

subtitles.original: あなたの心 傷つけてでも
subtitles.english: Even if I hurt your heart

subtitles.original: この気持ちに 嘘はつけない
subtitles.english: I can't lie to these feelings

subtitles.original: いつか 笑顔で 話せるような
subtitles.english: So that one day we can talk with a smile

subtitles.original: 私を 見つけて
subtitles.english: Find the me that...

subtitles.original: あー そばにいて 聞かせてほしい
subtitles.english: Ah, stay by my side, I want you to tell me

subtitles.original: 二度と 一人には しないと
subtitles.english: That you'll never leave me alone again

subtitles.original: 返らない日々 抱きしめたまま
subtitles.english: While embracing the days that won't return

subtitles.original: きっと そう きっと
subtitles.english: Surely, yes, surely

subtitles.original: あの日の気持ち 受け止めないと
subtitles.english: I have to accept the feelings of that day

subtitles.original: 前に 進むことができない
subtitles.english: Or I won't be able to move forward

subtitles.original: 離したくない 離れたくない
subtitles.english: Don't want to let go, don't want to be apart

subtitles.original: 一つの願いは
subtitles.english: My one wish is...

subtitles.original: 大好きだよと 伝えたいだけ
subtitles.english: I just want to tell you that I love you

subtitles.original: 本当 素直じゃないけれど
subtitles.english: Even though I'm not really honest

subtitles.original: So, how is it guys?
subtitles.english: So, how is it guys?

subtitles.original: That was "Closing".
subtitles.english: That was "Closing".

subtitles.original: Did you take a lot of screenshots?
subtitles.english: Did you take a lot of screenshots?

subtitles.original: And how about my new stage?
subtitles.english: And how about my new stage?

subtitles.original: Look!
subtitles.english: Look!

subtitles.original: It's very cloudy here.
subtitles.english: It's very cloudy here.

subtitles.original: There's two big Chill-Lous on the left and right.
subtitles.english: There's two big Chill-Lous on the left and right.

subtitles.original: So cute, right?
subtitles.english: So cute, right?

subtitles.original: みんなどうだった？コボのパフォーマンス。
subtitles.english: How was it, everyone? Kobo's performance.

subtitles.original: いっぱいスクリーンショット撮れたかな？うん。
subtitles.english: Did you get lots of screenshots? Yeah.

subtitles.original: コボの新しいステージはもうどうだった？
subtitles.english: What did you think of Kobo's new stage?

subtitles.original: 可愛いでしょ？
subtitles.english: It's cute, right?

subtitles.original: ビグチルスがありますのでめちゃ可愛いよね。
subtitles.english: The Big Chill-Lous are here, so it's super cute, right?

subtitles.original: So actually, yeah, we're already at the end of the show guys.
subtitles.english: So actually, yeah, we're already at the end of the show guys.

subtitles.original: そろそろお別れの時間になります。
subtitles.english: It's almost time to say goodbye.

subtitles.original: But don't worry.
subtitles.english: But don't worry.

subtitles.original: Kobo still has something to share with you guys.
subtitles.english: Kobo still has something to share with you guys.

subtitles.original: まだ皆さんにお知らせがあります。
subtitles.english: I still have an announcement for everyone.

subtitles.original: ジャン ジャジャーン！
subtitles.english: Ta-da!

subtitles.original: Kobo Kanaeru Birthday 2025 Merchandise
subtitles.english: Kobo Kanaeru Birthday 2025 Merchandise
